title: Self-Evolving Agents with Anytime-Valid Certificates
authors: Biswa Sengupta
publish: arXiv
abstract: Self-evolving agents violate the assumption behind most learning-theoretic guarantees: the data, evaluator, components, and hypothesis space are produced by the policy being updated. We present \textbf{SEA}, an architecture that confines self-modification to a small steering adapter and a versioned harness around a \emph{frozen} base model and admits each modification only through an anytime-valid gate that emits an auditable certificate against a fixed error budget. Five loop controllers compose published guarantees; because such gates can only \emph{select} among behaviors the frozen base already produces, five verifier-in-the-loop mechanisms -- best-of-$N$, micro-step search, self-authored reproduction oracles, search-layer control, and self-repair -- supply the dense, grader-free signal the gates require, computed from the issue text alone. On a $52$-instance SWE-bench Verified subset across four base models, base capability is the dominant, confound-free effect, and on two strong base models a deliberate no-op-composite control isolates the suite's contribution at $+4$ and $+5$ (\textsc{Glm}~5.2 $24\to28$; \textsc{Gpt} $29\to34$, the $65\%$ best), with event logs confirming that its mechanisms fire and prevent regressions. Results are single-run on expensive evaluations; confirming run-to-run variance and adapting the per-task algorithm mix are future work.
title_zh: 带有随时有效证书的自进化代理
abstract_zh: 自我演化代理违背了大多数学习理论保证背后的假设：数据、评估器、组件和假设空间都是由正在更新的策略所产生的。我们提出了 \textbf{SEA} 架构，该架构将自我修改限制在一个小型导向适配器和一个围绕 \emph{冻结}基础模型的版本化框架中，并且每次修改都通过一个随时有效门控进行，该门控会针对固定的错误预算发出可审计证书。五个循环控制器组合了已发表的保证；由于这些门控只能从冻结基础模型已经产生的行为中“选择”行为，因此五种验证者循环机制——N中最佳、微步搜索、自创复现预言机、搜索层控制和自我修复——提供了门控所需的密集、无评分信号，这些信号仅从问题文本中计算得出。在包含 52 个实例的 SWE-bench 验证子集上，对四个基础模型进行的实验表明，基础能力是主导因素且无混淆效应；而在两个强基础模型上，一个刻意的空操作复合控制将套件贡献隔离为 +4 和 +5（\textsc{Glm} 5.2 从 24 提升至 28；\textsc{Gpt} 从 29 提升至 34，即最高水平的 65%），事件日志确认其机制已触发并防止了性能退化。结果基于昂贵评估的单次运行；确认运行间差异以及调整每个任务的算法组合是未来的工作。

title: Large Language Models for Multi-Lingual Equivalent Mutant Detection: An Extended Empirical Study
authors: Honglin Shu, Zhao Tian, Dong Wang, Junji Yu, Jiazhe Zhang, Xuejie Cao, Junjie Chen, Yasutaka Kamei
publish: arXiv
abstract: Mutation testing is a powerful technique for ensuring software quality. However, the presence of equivalent mutants introduces unnecessary costs and biases, limiting its practical effectiveness. Although numerous equivalent mutant detection (EMD) methods have been proposed, they often face distinct challenges: pure-code analysis methods can be limited by their reliance on specific compiler infrastructures, while existing machine-learning approaches remain constrained by scarce training data and limited generalization to unseen mutants. Large language models (LLMs) have recently demonstrated remarkable performance across diverse code-related tasks by better capturing program semantics. Yet their potential for EMD remains largely unexplored, particularly in the multi-lingual context. This paper presents the first comprehensive empirical study on LLMs for EMD, using 3,302 Java and 1,088 C mutant pairs to benchmark against state-of-the-art methods, explore strategy variations, assess efficiency, and evaluate cross-lingual generalization. Experimental results show that LLM-based approaches achieve higher F1-scores than the evaluated traditional methods, with fine-tuned code embedding yielding the highest detection accuracy among the tested strategies. Moreover, LLM-based approaches strike a practical balance between effectiveness and efficiency with inference times comparable to existing machine-learning models. Importantly, fine-tuned LLMs demonstrate measurable generalization across programming languages. These findings establish LLMs as a viable and efficient approach for tackling the longstanding challenge of equivalent mutant detection, offering new directions for advancing mutation testing in practice.
title_zh: 用于多语言等价变异体检测的大语言模型：一项扩展的实证研究
abstract_zh: 突变测试是一种确保软件质量的强大技术。然而，等价突变体的存在带来了不必要的成本和偏差，限制了其实际有效性。尽管已有多种等价突变体检测（EMD）方法被提出，但它们常面临不同的挑战：纯代码分析方法可能因依赖特定编译器基础设施而受限，而现有的机器学习方法则受限于训练数据稀缺以及对未见突变体的泛化能力不足。大语言模型（LLMs）通过更好地捕捉程序语义，近期在各种代码相关任务中展现出卓越性能。然而，它们在EMD方面的潜力仍未被充分探索，尤其是在多语言场景下。本文首次对基于LLM的EMD方法进行了全面的实证研究，使用3,302个Java和1,088个C语言突变体对，与最先进方法进行基准测试、探索策略变体、评估效率以及跨语言泛化能力。实验结果表明，基于LLM的方法在F1分数上优于所评估的传统方法，其中微调代码嵌入在测试策略中达到了最高的检测准确率。此外，基于LLM的方法在有效性和效率之间取得了实际平衡，其推理时间与现有机器学习模型相当。重要的是，微调后的LLM在编程语言间展现出了可测量的泛化能力。这些发现确立了LLM作为解决等价突变体检测这一长期挑战的可行且高效的方法，为在实践中推进突变测试提供了新方向。

title: ClarifyCodeBench: Evaluating LLMs on Clarifying Ambiguous Requirements for Code Generation
authors: Zheng Fang, Dongming Jin, Yihong dong, Yongmin Li, Kechi Zhang, Zhi Jin, Ge Li
publish: arXiv
abstract: Large Language Models have emerged as programming assistants. However, the efficacy of code generation is constrained by the quality of input requirements, which are frequently ambiguous, incomplete, or underspecified. While LLMs excel at one-shot code synthesis, their ability to proactively clarify intent remains underexplored, as a critical trait for robust software engineering. Existing benchmarks largely overlook this interactive bottleneck, assuming perfectly specified prompts that do not reflect the iterative nature of requirement elicitation. To bridge this gap, we introduce ClarifyCodeBench, a novel interactive benchmark for evaluating LLMs' capability in resolving requirement ambiguity. Constructed from real-world programming tasks, ClarifyCodeBench features high-quality manual annotations, including N unique ambiguity types, associated clarification questions, and corresponding ground-truth answers. Furthermore, we formalize two rigorous metrics to assess the interaction quality: Turn-discounted Key Question Rate, which penalizes inefficient questioning, and Optimal Round Adherence, which measures the precision of the elicitation process. We conduct a systematic evaluation of six state-of-the-art LLMs using ClarifyCodeBench. Our empirical results yield three critical insights: 1) Capability Decoupling: Strong code generation performance does not inherently translate to effective requirement clarification; 2) The Reasoning Paradox: While increased computational thinking enhances code correctness, it yields marginal gains in identifying ambiguities; 3) The Multi-ambiguity Ceiling: LLMs' clarification performance degrades sharply as the density of ambiguities increases, revealing a significant bottleneck in handling complex, real-world specifications. Our work underscores the necessity for future AI4SE research to transition from static synthesis to interactive elicitation.
title_zh: ClarifyCodeBench：评估大语言模型对代码生成中模糊需求的澄清能力
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型已涌现为编程助手。然而，代码生成的效能受限于输入需求的质量——这些需求常常模糊、不完整或规定不足。尽管LLM在单次代码合成上表现出色，但它们主动澄清意图的能力（作为稳健软件工程的关键特质）仍未得到充分探索。现有基准测试普遍忽略了这一交互瓶颈，假设提示词完美明确，未能反映需求获取的迭代本质。为弥补这一空白，我们提出ClarifyCodeBench，一个用于评估LLM解决需求歧义能力的新型交互式基准测试。该基准基于真实编程任务构建，包含高质量人工标注，涵盖N种独特的歧义类型、相关澄清问题及对应的真实答案。此外，我们形式化了两个严格指标以评估交互质量：轮次衰减关键问题率（惩罚低效提问）与最优轮次遵从度（衡量获取过程的精确性）。我们使用ClarifyCodeBench对六种最先进的LLM进行了系统评估。实验得出了三个关键洞察：1）能力解耦：强大的代码生成能力并不天然转化为有效的需求澄清；2）推理悖论：提升计算思维虽能增强代码正确性，但在识别歧义方面仅带来边际收益；3）多歧义上限：随着歧义密度增加，LLM的澄清性能急剧下降，揭示了处理复杂真实世界规约时的显著瓶颈。我们的工作凸显了未来AI4SE研究需从静态合成转向交互式获取的必要性。

title: Is One Layer Enough? Training A Single Transformer Layer Can Match Full-Parameter RL Training
authors: Zijian Zhang, Rizhen Hu, Athanasios Glentis, Dawei Li, Chung-Yiu Yau, Hongzhou Lin, Mingyi Hong
publish: arXiv
abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) has become a central component of post-training large language models (LLMs), yet little is understood about how RL adaptation is distributed across transformer layers. Existing approaches typically update all model parameters uniformly, implicitly assuming that every layer contributes similarly to the gains obtained during RL post-training. In this work, we challenge this assumption through a systematic layer-wise study of RL training. Surprisingly, we find that training a single transformer layer can recover most of the gains achieved by full-parameter RL training, and in some cases even surpass it. To quantify this phenomenon, we introduce the quantity layer contribution, which measures the fraction of full RL improvement recovered by training a layer in isolation. Across seven models spanning two model families (Qwen3, Qwen2.5), three RL algorithms (GRPO, GiGPO, Dr. GRPO), and multiple task domains including mathematical reasoning, code generation, and agentic decision-making, we observe a remarkably stable pattern: RL gains are highly concentrated in a small subset of, and in many cases even a single, transformer layers. More strikingly, the same structural pattern consistently emerges: high-contribution layers concentrate in the middle of the transformer stack, while layers near the input and output ends contribute substantially less. The resulting layer rankings remain strongly correlated across datasets, tasks, model families, and RL algorithms.
title_zh: 一层就够了吗？训练单层Transformer能与全参数强化学习训练相匹敌
abstract_zh: 强化学习（RL）已成为大语言模型（LLM）后训练的核心组成部分，然而人们对RL适应过程如何分布在Transformer各层之间知之甚少。现有方法通常统一更新所有模型参数，隐含地假设每一层对RL后训练所获得的收益贡献相似。在本研究中，我们通过系统性的逐层RL训练分析对这一假设提出挑战。令人惊讶的是，我们发现只训练单个Transformer层就能恢复全参数RL训练所取得的绝大部分收益，在某些情况下甚至能超越后者。为量化这一现象，我们引入了“层贡献度”这一量度，用于衡量单独训练某层所恢复的全RL改进比例。在涵盖两个模型家族（Qwen3、Qwen2.5）、三种RL算法（GRPO、GiGPO、Dr. GRPO）以及数学推理、代码生成和智能体决策等多个任务领域的七个模型上，我们观察到一种极为稳定的模式：RL的收益高度集中于一小部分——在许多情况下甚至只有一个——Transformer层。更引人注目的是，相同的结构模式一致出现：高贡献层集中在Transformer堆栈的中部，而靠近输入和输出端的层贡献显著较小。由此得到的层排名在不同数据集、任务、模型家族和RL算法之间保持强相关性。

title: Antaeus: Hunting Repository-Level Logic Vulnerabilities via Context-Grounded LLM Reasoning
authors: Michele Armillotta, Nicolò Romandini, Rebecca Montanari, Lorenzo Cavallaro
publish: arXiv
abstract: LLM-based vulnerability detectors have shown promising results in identifying memory-safety bugs and vulnerability classes whose violations can often be expressed through established security properties. Logic vulnerabilities, however, pose a different challenge, as their identification requires inferring application-specific security invariants and implicit assumptions about intended behavior. Even frontier agentic models struggle because these invariants are often implicit and buried among unrelated code. Motivated by this gap, we present Antaeus, a framework for detecting logic vulnerabilities that grounds LLM reasoning in repository-level code context. Antaeus follows a repository-scale pipeline combining function prioritization, context-grounded reasoning, comparative validation, and structured reporting. It ranks functions using lightweight repo-wide security signals, directing costly LLM analysis toward relevant code and reducing calls, cost, and triage effort. For each prioritized function, Antaeus combines local code context with a repository-level view of the application's functionality, security resources, and trust boundaries. This enables reasoning about how the function is executed within the broader application rather than as an isolated snippet. Antaeus identifies security-sensitive sinks, derives safety conditions for safe execution, and checks whether they are locally satisfied. Candidate findings undergo comparative validation, pruning concerns that reflect project-wide norms rather than distinctive violations. Finally, Antaeus reports sinks, violated safety conditions, and evidence, making findings actionable and traceable. We evaluate Antaeus on 28 repositories with confirmed logic vulnerabilities and compare it against function-level and agentic models. Antaeus detects and explains 15 vulnerabilities, outperforming baselines with comparable token usage and cost.
title_zh: Antaeus: 通过基于上下文的LLM推理检测仓库级逻辑漏洞
abstract_zh: 基于大型语言模型（LLM）的漏洞检测器在识别内存安全漏洞以及那些通常可通过既定安全属性表达的漏洞类别方面已展现出显著成效。然而，逻辑漏洞构成了不同的挑战，因为其识别需要推断特定于应用程序的安全不变量以及关于预期行为的隐含假设。即便是最前沿的智能体模型也难以应对，因为这些不变量往往是隐式的，且深埋在不相关的代码中。基于这一差距，我们提出了 Antaeus——一个将 LLM 推理嵌入仓库级代码上下文的逻辑漏洞检测框架。Antaeus 遵循一个仓库规模的流水线，该流水线结合了函数优先级排序、基于上下文的推理、对比验证和结构化报告。它利用轻量级的仓库级安全信号对函数进行排序，从而将代价高昂的 LLM 分析引导至相关代码，并减少调用、成本和分类工作量。对于每个优先级排序后的函数，Antaeus 将局部代码上下文与仓库级的应用程序功能、安全资源和信任边界视图相结合。这使得它能够推理该函数在更广泛的应用程序中如何执行，而非将其视为一个孤立的代码片段。Antaeus 识别安全敏感型的接收点，推导出安全执行的条件，并检查这些条件是否在局部得到满足。候选发现会经过对比验证，从而剔除那些反映项目整体规范而非特定违规的问题。最后，Antaeus 报告接收点、被违反的安全条件以及相关证据，使发现变得可操作且可追溯。我们在 28 个已确认存在逻辑漏洞的仓库上对 Antaeus 进行了评估，并将其与函数级模型和智能体模型进行了比较。Antaeus 检测并解释了 15 个漏洞，在 token 使用量和成本相当的情况下优于基线模型。

title: Leveraging LLM-Based Agentic Systems to Generate Quantum Applications for Test Optimization
authors: Ming Tao, Yuechen Li, Tao Yue, Man Zhang, Aitor Arrieta Marcos
publish: arXiv
abstract: Quantum computing is increasingly explored for software engineering (SE) optimization, but translating natural-language (NL) task-level requirements into executable quantum applications still demands substantial quantum and programming expertise. We present QPipe, a large language model (LLM)-based multi-agent architecture that autonomously turns NL requirements into traceable quantum-application workflows through specialized agents for requirement parsing, formulation, code generation, review, execution, and verification. We evaluate QPipe on 20 NL requirements, each associated with a real-world benchmark and a test-optimization problem. QPipe successfully completes the key stages of quantum-application generation across requirements, achieving average rates of 100% for code compilation and 96.7% for application execution and final-result combination, with average generation costs of 260.1 seconds and 1.89M tokens per requirement. Among the generated quantum applications that execute successfully, the returned solutions outperform the offline genetic algorithm baseline in most cases. Ablation results further show that QPipe's advantage depends on retaining code-generation skills, task knowledge, review feedback, and multi-agent decomposition. These results indicate that agentic coordination can support generation of executable quantum applications for tackling test optimization problems from real-world benchmarks.
title_zh: 利用基于大语言模型的智能体系统生成量子应用以优化测试
abstract_zh: 量子计算在软件工程优化中的应用日益受到探索，但将自然语言任务级需求转换为可执行的量子应用仍需大量的量子与编程专业知识。我们提出QPipe，一种基于大型语言模型的多智能体架构，通过专门化的智能体（用于需求解析、制定、代码生成、审查、执行和验证）自主将自然语言需求转化为可溯源的量子应用工作流。我们在20个自然语言需求上评估QPipe，每个需求关联一个真实世界基准和一个测试优化问题。QPipe成功完成了各需求中量子应用生成的关键阶段，实现了代码编译平均100%的成功率，应用执行与最终结果组合96.7%的成功率，平均每个需求生成耗时260.1秒，消耗189万token。在成功执行的生成量子应用中，返回的解在大多数情况下优于离线遗传算法基线。消融结果进一步表明，QPipe的优势依赖于保留代码生成技能、任务知识、审查反馈以及多智能体分解。这些结果表明，智能体协作能够支持生成可执行的量子应用，以解决来自真实世界基准的测试优化问题。

title: Delta Debugging in the Absence of Test Oracles Through Metamorphic Testing
authors: Mingyue Jiang, Yongqiang Tian, Tsong Yueh Chen
publish: arXiv
abstract: Delta debugging provides an automatic way to minimize a program input while preserving a certain property. However, its effectiveness fundamentally relies on the availability of test oracles to determine whether a reduced input still preserves the specific property. Consequently, the oracle problem substantially limits the applicability of existing delta debugging techniques, particularly for oracle-deficient programs where output correctness cannot be directly determined. To address this problem, this paper proposes a novel approach, DDMT, to enhance the applicability of delta debugging, especially facilitating its application to oracle-deficient programs. Our key insight is to redesign an oracle-independent test function and incorporate it into the reduction procedure of delta debugging such that the property-preservation validation can be accomplished without requiring a test oracle. To this end, DDMT employs the technique of metamorphic testing, which is a property-based and oracle-independent testing method. It establishes a metamorphic testing-based test function, using it as a replacement for the original test function adopted by delta debugging. The experiments evaluate DDMT on 66 subjects across both oracle-available and oracle-deficient scenarios, with different delta debugging approaches. The results positively confirm that DDMT can enhance the applicability of delta debugging while often preserving or improving reduction effectiveness and query efficiency. Furthermore, compared to the relevant delta debugging approaches, DDMT is also able to achieve performance improvements with proper configurations.
title_zh: 基于蜕变测试的无测试预言增量调试
abstract_zh: Delta调试提供了一种自动化的方法，能够在保留特定属性的同时最小化程序输入。然而，其有效性从根本上依赖于测试预言（test oracle）的可用性，以判断简化后的输入是否仍保留该属性。因此，预言问题严重限制了现有Delta调试技术的适用性，尤其是在输出正确性无法直接判定的缺乏预言的程序（oracle-deficient programs）中。为解决这一问题，本文提出了一种新方法DDMT，旨在增强Delta调试的适用性，特别是促进其在缺乏预言的程序中的应用。我们的关键洞察是重新设计一种独立于预言的测试函数，并将其整合到Delta调试的归约过程中，从而无需测试预言即可完成属性保留验证。为此，DDMT采用了蜕变测试（metamorphic testing）技术，这是一种基于属性且独立于预言的测试方法。它构建了一个基于蜕变测试的测试函数，用以替代Delta调试原本采用的测试函数。实验在66个主题上评估了DDMT，涵盖了有预言和缺乏预言的场景，并采用了不同的Delta调试方法。结果积极证实，DDMT能够增强Delta调试的适用性，同时通常保持或提升归约效果与查询效率。此外，与相关的Delta调试方法相比，DDMT在适当配置下也能实现性能提升。

title: Beyond Document Grounding: Span-Level Hallucination Detection over Code, Tool Output, and Documents
authors: Ádám Kovács, Bowei He, Xue Liu, István Boros, Szilveszter Tóth, Gábor Recski
publish: arXiv
abstract: Hallucination detection for retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) is usually evaluated on natural-language document evidence. However, grounded generation systems increasingly rely on structured inputs: source code, developer-tool output, markdown documents, tables, and repository metadata. We introduce a unified benchmark for span-level hallucination detection over code, tool output, structured documents, and existing natural-language RAG datasets. The benchmark is built by starting from grounded correct answers, injecting localized hallucinations with exact character labels, and validating the code test split with evidence-based review. Our fine-tuned Qwen3.5-2B detector reaches 0.689 span-F1 on the unified test set and 0.60 on the code-agent source, where it substantially outperforms LettuceDetect-large (0.17) and the strongest zero-shot LLM judges we evaluated (at most 0.22). The same model remains competitive on established natural-language benchmarks, with 81.8 RAGTruth example-F1 and 0.724 English PsiloQA IoU.
title_zh: 超越文档依据：对代码、工具输出和文档的跨度级幻觉检测
abstract_zh: 针对检索增强生成（RAG）的幻觉检测通常基于自然语言文档证据进行评估。然而，基于真实信息的生成系统正越来越多地依赖结构化输入：源代码、开发者工具输出、Markdown文档、表格及代码仓库元数据。为此，我们提出一个统一的基准，用于对代码、工具输出、结构化文档以及现有自然语言RAG数据集进行跨度级幻觉检测。该基准的构建过程为：从基于真实信息的正确答案出发，注入带有精确字符标签的局部化幻觉，并通过基于证据的审查对代码测试子集进行验证。我们微调的Qwen3.5-2B检测器在统一测试集上达到了0.689的跨度F1值，在代码代理源上达到0.60，显著优于LettuceDetect-large（0.17）以及我们评估的最强零样本大语言模型评判者（最高0.22）。同一模型在成熟自然语言基准上仍具竞争力，在RAGTruth上取得81.8的示例级F1值，在英文PsiloQA上取得0.724的IoU值。

title: Rise From The Ashes: LLM-based Static Analysis for Deep Learning Framework Bugs
authors: Shaoyu Yang, Haifeng Lin, Chunrong Fang, Xiang Chen, Wei Cheng, Jiawei Liu, Yiyu Zhang, Hongyu Liu, Zhenyu Chen
publish: arXiv
abstract: Deep learning (DL) frameworks are critical AI infrastructures that often hide bugs with serious security implications. While dynamic approaches such as fuzzing are effective in uncovering these bugs, they require real test execution and incur high computational costs. Static analysis is a natural complement because it can detect bugs without runtime execution, offering fast and scalable testing. Unfortunately, there is still limited work targeting static analysis for DL frameworks due to their multilingual architectures and tensor-related program state. We present Phoenix, the first LLM-based static analysis technique for DL frameworks. Our key insight is that cross-language tensor flows in DL frameworks can be modeled, together with concrete code context, as a structured semantic bridge intermediate representation (SBIR) that LLMs can analyze for potential bugs in tensor semantic propagation. We implement this insight through a multi-agent workflow. A summarization agent first distills bug summaries from historical bug-fix patches and CWE rules. Guided by each summary, an extraction agent identifies bug-relevant repository symbols for code retrieval, and a generation agent synthesizes grounded SBIRs from the retrieved context. Finally, an analysis agent is leveraged to check SBIRs and report potential bugs. Our evaluation shows that Phoenix is a practical complement to dynamic DL framework testing for bug finding. To date, Phoenix has found 31 real new bugs in PyTorch for different heterogeneous hardware backends (Intel CPU, NVIDIA CUDA, and Apple MPS). Among them, 20 submitted bug-fixing patches have been merged into upstream.
title_zh: 浴火重生：基于LLM的深度学习框架缺陷静态分析
abstract_zh: 深度学习（DL）框架是关键的AI基础设施，但其中常隐藏着具有严重安全隐患的缺陷。尽管模糊测试等动态方法能有效发现这些缺陷，但它们需要实际执行测试并消耗高昂的计算成本。静态分析作为自然补充，能在不运行程序的情况下检测缺陷，提供快速且可扩展的测试能力。然而，由于DL框架的多语言架构和与张量相关的程序状态，目前针对DL框架的静态分析工作仍然有限。我们提出Phoenix，这是首个基于大语言模型（LLM）的DL框架静态分析技术。我们的核心洞察是，DL框架中的跨语言张量流可以结合具体代码上下文，建模为一种结构化语义桥接中间表示（SBIR），使LLM能够分析张量语义传播中的潜在缺陷。我们通过多智能体工作流实现这一洞察。首先，一个摘要智能体从历史缺陷修复补丁和CWE规则中提炼缺陷摘要。在每个摘要的指导下，一个提取智能体识别与缺陷相关的代码仓库符号用于代码检索，一个生成智能体从检索上下文中合成基于事实的SBIR。最后，利用分析智能体检查SBIR并报告潜在缺陷。评估表明，Phoenix是对动态DL框架缺陷检测方法的实用补充。迄今为止，Phoenix已在PyTorch的不同异构硬件后端（Intel CPU、NVIDIA CUDA和Apple MPS）上发现了31个真实的新缺陷。其中，20个已提交的缺陷修复补丁已被合并到主分支。

title: Knowledge-Enhanced Agentic Vulnerability Repair
authors: Sicong Cao, Hao Ma, Le Yu, Kangyi Ding, Xiaolei Liu, Terry Yue Zhuo, Bo Wang, Xingwei Lin, Xiaobing Sun, Linzhang Wang, David Lo
publish: arXiv
abstract: Frontier foundation models have changed the math on vulnerability discovery, but the bigger challenge is how the remediation side keeps up. Despite recent progresses in Automated Vulnerability Repair (AVR), current solutions struggle to reliably identify the root causes of vulnerabilities, and insufficiently utilize the prior fix knowledge to guide the patch generation process, thus undermining their effectiveness in practice. To address this gap, we propose KeaRepair, a novel agentic AVR approach that grounds patch generation in verified program facts and high-level vulnerability knowledge. Specifically, KeaRepair first extracts multi-dimensional vulnerability knowledge from historical vulnerability-patch pairs from dual complementary views, and constructs dedicated retrieval knowledge bases. It then employs a tool-augmented agent that performs ReAct-style reasoning to collect verified program facts for vulnerability diagnosis. Finally, based on the diagnostic results, KeaRepair performs knowledge-level retrieval-augmented patch generation and iteratively refines patches through a closed-loop validation process involving compilation, PoC replay, and test-suite execution. Experimental results show that KeaRepair significantly outperforms existing AVR approaches on 55 reproducible C/C++ vulnerabilities. When paired with Gemini-3.1-Pro, KeaRepair successfully repairs 46 vulnerabilities, achieving a repair rate of 83.64%. Moreover, KeaRepair fixes six unique vulnerabilities that none of the baselines can address, and further demonstrates strong cross-language generalizability.
title_zh: 知识增强的自主漏洞修复
abstract_zh: 前沿基础模型改变了漏洞发现的模式，但更大的挑战在于修复侧如何跟上步伐。尽管自动漏洞修复（AVR）近期取得了进展，但现有方案仍难以可靠地识别漏洞根本原因，且未能充分利用已有的修复知识来指导补丁生成过程，从而削弱了其在实际应用中的有效性。为弥补这一不足，我们提出了KeaRepair，一种新颖的自主式AVR方法，它基于已验证的程序事实和高层漏洞知识来生成补丁。具体而言，KeaRepair首先从双互补视角的历史漏洞-补丁对中提取多维漏洞知识，并构建专用的检索知识库；接着采用工具增强型智能体，通过ReAct式推理收集已验证的程序事实以进行漏洞诊断；最后根据诊断结果，执行基于知识检索的补丁生成，并通过包含编译、PoC重放和测试套件执行的闭环验证流程迭代优化补丁。实验结果表明，在55个可复现的C/C++漏洞上，KeaRepair显著优于现有AVR方法。结合Gemini-3.1-Pro时，KeaRepair成功修复46个漏洞，修复率达83.64%。此外，KeaRepair修复了所有基线模型均无法解决的六个独特漏洞，并进一步展现出强大的跨语言泛化能力。

title: LLVM-Bench: Benchmarking and Advancing Large Language Models for LLVM Compiler Issue Resolution
authors: Zhao Tian, Yingquan Zhao, Chenyao Suo, Meng Wang, Junjie Chen
publish: arXiv
abstract: LLVM is a widely used compiler infrastructure whose scale and complexity make issue resolution labor-intensive and challenging. Although large language models (LLMs) have recently achieved remarkable success in issue resolution, their effectiveness on complex system-level LLVM compiler remains largely unexplored. To address this gap, we introduce LLVM-Bench, the first large-scale benchmark for LLVM issue resolution, containing 423 real-world, validated tasks collected from the LLVM project. We further develop LLVM-Gym, a scalable evaluation platform that automates issue reproduction, patch application, compiler building, and test execution. Using LLVM-Bench and LLVM-Gym, we conduct a comprehensive study of four representative LLMs, six retrieval configurations, and three agents. Our results show that current LLM-based issue resolution techniques remain limited on LLVM-Bench, with patch invalidity and build failures as the dominant failure modes. We further reveal a strong complementarity among different LLMs and agents, motivating LLVM-Ens, a lightweight ensemble approach that expands the patch space through integrating the patches generated by diverse techniques, filters incorrect and redundant candidates, and identifies the most promising solution. Our results show that LLVM-Ens achieves a resolution rate of up to 21.99%, further improving LLVM issue resolution.
title_zh: LLVM-Bench：面向LLVM编译器问题解决的大语言模型基准测试与进展
abstract_zh: LLVM 是一种广泛使用的编译器基础设施，其规模与复杂性使得问题解决变得劳动密集且极具挑战。尽管大语言模型（LLMs）近年已在问题解决领域取得显著成功，但其在复杂的系统级LLVM编译器上的有效性仍缺乏深入探索。为填补这一空白，我们提出了LLVM-Bench——首个面向LLVM问题解决的大规模基准测试，包含从LLVM项目中收集的423个真实世界的验证任务。我们还开发了LLVM-Gym，一个可扩展的评估平台，用于自动化问题复现、补丁应用、编译器构建和测试执行。借助LLVM-Bench与LLVM-Gym，我们对四种代表性大语言模型、六种检索配置和三种智能体进行了全面研究。结果表明，当前基于大语言模型的问题解决技术在LLVM-Bench上仍存在局限，主要失败模式为补丁无效与构建失败。此外，我们发现不同大语言模型与智能体之间存在强互补性，由此提出LLVM-Ens——一种轻量级集成方法，通过整合不同技术生成的补丁来扩展补丁空间、过滤错误与冗余候选方案，并识别出最优解决方案。实验结果显示，LLVM-Ens可实现高达21.99%的问题解决率，进一步提升了LLVM问题修复能力。

title: Towards Better Linux Kernel Fault Localization: Leveraging Contrastive Reasoning and Hierarchical Context Analysis
authors: Haichi Wang, Ruiguo Yu, Yesong Pang, Yingquan Zhao, Junjie Chen, Jiajun Jiang, Zan Wang
publish: arXiv
abstract: Debugging the Linux kernel remains a formidable challenge due to its vast codebase, complex architecture, and low-level programming intricacies. Effective fault localization (FL) is thus essential for efficient kernel debugging and maintenance. While existing FL techniques (both traditional and LLM-based) have shown promise in general-purpose software, they are ill-suited for the kernel context. In particular, recent LLM-based techniques often treat bug reports and source code as plain text, lacking deep integration of kernel-specific knowledge, which limits their ability to identify root causes and achieve fine-grained localization. We present CoHiKer, a novel LLM-based FL technique tailored to the Linux kernel. CoHiKer introduces two key innovations: (1) contrastive reasoning, which identifies root causes by analyzing the behavioral divergence between carefully mutated passing and failing test cases, and (2) hierarchical context analysis, which systematically narrows the localization scope from files to methods by integrating crash reports, syscall semantics, inter-file dependencies, and kernel-specific features. Unlike prior techniques that rely on static understanding and full-code input, CoHiKer decomposes the localization task and enables structured LLM prompting to reason semantically over meaningful contexts. We evaluate CoHiKer on an extended Linux kernel bug dataset against five state-of-the-art baselines. CoHiKer consistently outperforms all competitors, improving Top-1 localization accuracy by up to 26.07% at the file level and 56.85% at the method level over state-of-the-art LLM-based baselines, while achieving up to 8.84% and 28.9% reductions in token consumption, respectively. Furthermore, CoHiKer demonstrates strong generalizability on the non-kernel dataset, with comparable gains (15.5% and 5.3% in Top-1 at file and method levels).
title_zh: 迈向更好的Linux内核故障定位：利用对比推理与分层上下文分析
abstract_zh: 调试Linux内核因其庞大的代码库、复杂的架构以及底层编程的复杂性，始终是一项艰巨的挑战。因此，高效的故障定位（FL）对于内核调试与维护至关重要。尽管现有的FL技术（包括传统方法和基于大语言模型的方法）在通用软件中表现出了潜力，但它们并不适用于内核场景。特别是，近期基于大语言模型的技术往往将错误报告和源代码视为普通文本，缺乏对内核特定知识的深度整合，这限制了它们识别根本原因以及实现细粒度定位的能力。我们提出了CoHiKer，一种专为Linux内核设计的新型基于大语言模型的FL技术。CoHiKer引入了两项关键创新：（1）对比推理，通过分析精心变异的失败与成功测试用例之间的行为差异来识别根本原因；（2）层级上下文分析，通过整合崩溃报告、系统调用语义、跨文件依赖关系以及内核特定特征，系统性地将定位范围从文件缩小到方法。与依赖静态理解和全代码输入的现有技术不同，CoHiKer分解了定位任务，并实现了结构化的LLM提示，以便在有意义的上下文上进行语义推理。我们在一个扩展的Linux内核错误数据集上，将CoHiKer与五个最先进的基线方法进行了评估。CoHiKer持续优于所有竞争对手，在文件级别和方法级别上，相较于最先进的基于LLM的基线方法，Top-1定位准确率分别提升了最高26.07%和56.85%，同时令牌消耗分别降低了最高8.84%和28.9%。此外，CoHiKer在非内核数据集上也展现了强大的泛化能力，在文件级别和方法级别的Top-1上分别取得了15.5%和5.3%的增益。

title: SchedCheck: Schedule-Robustness Analysis for Event-Driven Block Programs
authors: Yuan Si, Jialu Zhang
publish: arXiv
abstract: Block-based languages such as Scratch let beginners assemble interactive programs from sprites and scripts. These programs are concurrent in practice: green-flag scripts, broadcasts, and clones run as cooperatively scheduled threads over shared sprite and stage state, and their authors never write a thread. We show that such programs contain schedule-sensitive behaviors whose observable result depends on an execution order the language leaves open. Editing, saving, or remixing a project can produce a copy with the same blocks but a different layer order, changing the order the virtual machine starts scripts. We formalize the schedule space a Scratch virtual machine can realize as the permutations of the initial executable-target order, and define schedule-robustness against a lattice of observation lenses over a fixed horizon. A partial-order exploration runs one schedule per dependence-equivalence class, and on projects small enough to enumerate, an independent oracle confirms it recovers every realizable outcome. On larger projects, representatives stand in for the factorial under the validated dependence model. SchedCheck implements this on the production Scratch VM. Across 224 real student projects, at least 21% of the concurrent ones are schedule-sensitive at the grading lens, and a uniform random sample of public projects replicates the rate at 17.6%, with two real remixes of a deployed animation arranging its letters differently. On hand-built fault pairs and a generated benchmark of 32 spec-defined faults across four classes, the tool detects and localizes every schedule fault, with a logic-fault control reporting clean. The oracle exposed four unsoundness gaps in the dependence model, all repaired. The method is parametric in the execution model, instantiating unchanged on a second cooperative event loop.
title_zh: SchedCheck：事件驱动块程序的调度鲁棒性分析
abstract_zh: 基于块的语言（如Scratch）允许初学者通过精灵和脚本组装交互式程序。这些程序在实践中是并发的：绿旗脚本、广播和克隆作为协同调度的线程运行，共享精灵和舞台状态，而编写者从未显式编写线程。我们证明此类程序包含调度敏感行为，其可观察结果依赖于语言未明确规定的执行顺序。编辑、保存或改编项目可能生成块相同但图层顺序不同的副本，从而改变虚拟机启动脚本的顺序。我们将Scratch虚拟机可实现的调度空间形式化为初始可执行目标顺序的排列，并定义了在固定时间范围内针对观测透镜格结构的调度鲁棒性。一种偏序探索为每个依赖等价类运行一个调度，对于足够小可枚举的项目，独立的预言机确认它能覆盖所有可实现的结果。对于较大项目，代表调度在验证的依赖模型下代替阶乘数量的调度。SchedCheck在官方Scratch虚拟机上实现了该方法。通过对224个真实学生项目的分析，至少21%的并发项目在评分透镜下呈现调度敏感性；对公开项目的均匀随机抽样复现了17.6%的比率，其中两个已部署动画的真实改编版以不同方式排列其字母。在手工构建的故障对以及跨越四个类别的32个规范定义故障的生成基准测试中，该工具检测并定位了所有调度故障，逻辑故障对照组报告为无故障。预言机揭示了依赖模型中的四个不完整缺陷，均已修复。该方法在执行模型上是参数化的，可在第二个协同事件循环上不经修改地实例化。

title: RepoRescue: An Empirical Study of LLM Agents on Whole-Repository Compatibility Rescue
authors: Zhihao Lin, Mingyi Zhou, Zhensu Sun, Yizhuo Yang, Renyu Yang, David Lo, Li Li
publish: arXiv
abstract: Open-source libraries and tools are widely reused, but compatibility maintenance is expensive. Once maintainers leave, useful repositories can stop working as runtimes and dependencies evolve. We study whether LLM agents can adapt old repositories to modern environments, a task we call compatibility rescue. Unlike bug repair, compatibility rescue starts from a repository that worked in its original environment but fails after ecosystem drift. RepoRescue gives agents only the repository and its failing modern environment; the agent must diagnose the failure, locate affected code, and produce a source-code rescue that restores the historical test suite. We build RepoRescue from 193 Python and 122 Java repositories, each verified to pass historically and fail after modernization. We evaluate five deployed agent systems on Python and three on Java. Beyond full-patch pass rate, we rerun patches after removing test-file edits to measure source-only repair, add a runtime-enforced regime that blocks test edits, and validate practical use for repositories whose suites pass after rescue. We find that Claude Code systems sometimes edit failing tests even when prompted not to; with runtime blocking, Kimi still rescues 41.5% of repositories. Systems are complementary: their union reaches 62.7%, exceeding the best single system by 10.9 points. Difficulty concentrates in cross-file coordination: on 14 repositories requiring coordinated whole-codebase changes, GPT-5.2 through Codex passes all 14, while every Claude Code system passes at most two. Finally, a passing suite is only an initial signal: among 34 unmaintained Python candidates whose suites pass after rescue, 22 work in realistic scenarios and 12 pass bug-hunt with patches that address the compatibility failure. RepoRescue benchmarks compatibility rescue with source-only auditing, runtime enforcement, practical validation, and reasoning labels.
title_zh: RepoRescue：关于LLM智能体在全仓库兼容性修复方面的实证研究
abstract_zh: 开源库和工具被广泛复用，但兼容性维护成本高昂。一旦维护者离开，随着运行时和依赖项的演变，有用的仓库可能会停止工作。我们研究LLM代理能否将旧仓库适配到现代环境，这一任务称为兼容性救赎。与错误修复不同，兼容性救赎始于一个在原始环境中正常工作但在生态系统漂移后失效的仓库。RepoRescue仅向代理提供仓库及其失效的现代环境；代理必须诊断故障、定位受影响的代码，并生成恢复历史测试套件的源代码救赎方案。我们从193个Python仓库和122个Java仓库构建RepoRescue，每个仓库均经验证在历史上能通过测试，而在现代化后失效。我们在Python上评估了五个已部署的代理系统，在Java上评估了三个。除了完整补丁通过率，我们还通过移除测试文件编辑后重新运行补丁来衡量仅源代码修复，添加运行时强制机制来阻止测试编辑，并验证仓库在救赎后测试套件通过的实际用途。我们发现，Claude Code系统有时会在被提示不要编辑的情况下仍编辑失败的测试；通过运行时阻止，Kimi仍能救赎41.5%的仓库。各系统具有互补性：它们的联合覆盖率达到了62.7%，超过最佳单一系统10.9个百分点。难点集中在跨文件协调上：在需要协调全代码库更改的14个仓库中，GPT-5.2通过Codex全部通过，而每个Claude Code系统最多通过两个。最后，测试套件通过仅是一个初始信号：在34个未维护的Python候选仓库中，其测试套件在救赎后通过，其中22个在真实场景中工作，12个通过错误狩猎，且补丁解决了兼容性故障。RepoRescue通过仅源代码审计、运行时强制、实际验证和推理标签来基准测试兼容性救赎。

title: Autonomous Scientific Discovery via Iterative Meta-Reflection
authors: Bingchen Zhao, Sara Beery, Oisin Mac Aodha
publish: arXiv
abstract: Autonomous scientific discovery systems offer the potential to accelerate research by automating the process of hypothesis generation and validation. However, current systems operate within constrained search spaces or require predefined research questions, limiting their capacity for true open-ended inquiry. Furthermore, while they generate hypotheses iteratively, they largely lack the ability to explicitly synthesize their own accumulated findings to uncover complex, interconnected phenomena. We introduce DiscoPER, an autonomous large language model-powered framework that conducts open-ended research by dynamically generating and executing code to explore datasets without pre-specified research objectives. To ensure rigorous scientific validity, every proposed discovery must pass statistical testing. To overcome the limitations of isolated search, our framework introduces a second-order reasoning mechanism that periodically analyzes its own accumulated discoveries. By treating prior discoveries as empirical data, DiscoPER identifies structural patterns, confounds, and epistemic gaps, actively redirecting hypothesis exploration toward uncharted regions of the search space. The search space is further expanded by incorporating tool use, enabling the system to explore hypotheses beyond structured metadata by seamlessly processing and extracting useful information from multimodal sources like images. Evaluated on iNatDisco, a new multimodal ecological knowledge benchmark with pattern-level ground truth obtained from peer-reviewed literature, DiscoPER recovers 8 of 9 known patterns with a 72.7% hypothesis support rate, outperforming both classical causal discovery and LLM-guided baselines. Ablations show that DiscoPER scales with more data, and confirms the benefits of second-order meta-reflection.
title_zh: 通过迭代元反思的自主科学发现
abstract_zh: 自主科学发现系统通过自动化假设生成与验证流程，有望加速科研进程。然而，现有系统或受限于预设搜索空间，或需预先定义研究问题，难以实现真正的开放式探索。此外，尽管这些系统能迭代生成假设，但大多缺乏对自身积累发现进行显式综合以揭示复杂互连现象的能力。我们提出DiscoPER——一种基于大型语言模型的自主框架，通过动态生成并执行代码来探索数据集，无需预设研究目标即可开展开放式研究。为确保严谨的科学有效性，每项拟议发现必须通过统计检验。为突破孤立搜索的局限，该框架引入二阶推理机制，定期分析自身积累的发现。通过将先前发现视为经验数据，DiscoPER能识别结构模式、混淆因素与认知空白，主动将假设探索引导至搜索空间中未被探索的区域。此外，通过集成工具使用（如从图像等多模态来源无缝处理与提取有用信息），进一步拓展了搜索空间，使系统能探索超越结构化元数据的假设。在iNatDisco（一种新型多模态生态知识基准，包含从同行评议文献获取的模式级真实标注）上的评估显示，DiscoPER以72.7%的假设支持率恢复了9个已知模式中的8个，优于经典因果发现和基于大语言模型的基线方法。消融研究表明，DiscoPER的性能随数据量增加而提升，并证实了二阶元反思的益处。

title: SWE-Doctor: Guiding Software Engineering Agents with Runtime Diagnosis from Multi-Faceted Bug Reproduction Tests
authors: Yaoqi Guo, Yang Liu, Jie M. Zhang, Yun Ma, Yiling Lou, Zhenpeng Chen
publish: arXiv
abstract: Large language model (LLM)-based software engineering agents are increasingly developed to resolve software issues by generating patches from issue reports and code repositories. Bug reproduction tests (BRTs) are an important building block for such agents and have been shown useful for patch validation. However, it remains unclear whether BRTs can also help the more central stage of patch generation. We first conduct a preliminary study and find that directly using advanced BRT generators to guide patch generation is not beneficial: fail-to-fail BRTs can mislead agents, while even fail-to-pass BRTs bring limited or negative gains. Our analysis reveals two reasons: fail-to-pass BRTs may cover only one manifestation of the reported issue, leading to partial patches, whereas fail-to-fail BRTs are unreliable as direct patch-generation targets. Motivated by these insights, we propose SWE-Doctor, a software issue resolution agent that guides patch generation with runtime diagnoses derived from multi-faceted BRT executions. SWE-Doctor first generates multi-faceted BRTs for different behavioral requirements stated in the issue, then executes and debugs these BRTs to construct runtime-grounded diagnosis records, and finally uses the diagnoses together with localization information inferred during BRT generation to guide patch generation and reduce partial patches. We evaluate SWE-Doctor on Python bug-fixing issues from the widely adopted SWE-bench Verified and SWE-bench Pro across five LLM backends. SWE-Doctor consistently outperforms existing agents across all 10 LLM-benchmark combinations, achieving average resolution rates of 75.7% on SWE-bench Verified and 59.4% on SWE-bench Pro. In particular, on the more challenging SWE-bench Pro, SWE-Doctor improves the average resolution rate by 8.0-8.9 percentage points over the baseline agents.
title_zh: SWE-Doctor：利用多方面错误复现测试的运行时诊断指导软件工程代理
abstract_zh: 基于大型语言模型（LLM）的软件工程代理正越来越多地被开发，用于通过从问题报告和代码仓库生成补丁来解决软件问题。错误复现测试（BRT）是此类代理的重要构建模块，已被证明有助于补丁验证。然而，目前尚不清楚BRT是否也能在更核心的补丁生成阶段发挥作用。我们首先进行了一项初步研究，发现直接使用先进的BRT生成器来指导补丁生成并无益处：失败-到-失败的BRT会误导代理，而即使是失败-到-通过的BRT也只能带来有限甚至负面的收益。我们的分析揭示了两个原因：失败-到-通过的BRT可能只覆盖了报告问题的一种表现，导致部分补丁；而失败-到-失败的BRT作为直接的补丁生成目标并不可靠。受这些发现的启发，我们提出了SWE-Doctor，一种软件问题解决代理，它利用从多方面的BRT执行中得出的运行时诊断来指导补丁生成。SWE-Doctor首先针对问题中描述的不同行为需求生成多方面的BRT，然后执行并调试这些BRT以构建基于运行时的诊断记录，最后利用这些诊断以及BRT生成过程中推断出的定位信息来指导补丁生成并减少部分补丁。我们在广泛采用的SWE-bench Verified和SWE-bench Pro上的Python错误修复问题上，使用五种LLM后端对SWE-Doctor进行了评估。在所有10种LLM-基准组合中，SWE-Doctor始终优于现有代理，在SWE-bench Verified上平均解决率为75.7%，在SWE-bench Pro上为59.4%。特别是在更具挑战性的SWE-bench Pro上，SWE-Doctor相比基线代理将平均解决率提高了8.0-8.9个百分点。

title: Checked Program Recovery from Execution Video: A Sound Oracle for Untrusted Generators
authors: Yuan Si, Jialu Zhang
publish: arXiv
abstract: A growing class of tools recovers a program from observations of its behavior using an untrusted generator, a neural model or a search, that proposes candidates with no correctness guarantee. We study how to make such recovery trustworthy, in the concrete setting of recovering a runnable Scratch program from a recording of its execution. The recording shows what the program does but never its code; many programs produce the same video, so the source cannot be recovered, and the right target is a program that behaves the same as far as the camera can tell, made precise with a lens. The core is a two-tier validation oracle with a deliberate verdict asymmetry. A static checker proves lens-equivalence to a reference and issues a certificate that, granting the partial-order independence quotient adequate, never accepts a wrong program; a renderer can only refute or witness finite agreement, never certify. Around it, Vid2Prog reads each sprite's motion, visibility, and timing from the video and a known-asset manifest and synthesizes a candidate source-free; a closed loop renders and runs recovery again for ground truth. Under the exact lens the oracle makes no false accept on 246 labeled differing pairs, including an adversarial battery built to trap its concurrency quotient; on inputs outside the vocabulary and on real projects it abstains or refutes, accepting none we test. In-vocabulary recoveries reproduce their source frame for frame and 80% earn a static certificate, while whole real projects, mostly outside the vocabulary, recover at 14%, a vocabulary-bound rate the system never inflates with a wrong answer. A frontier vision-language model recovers none of the matched programs single-shot, which oracle-in-the-loop repair lifts only to a few while the structured pipeline recovers all, the gap a sound checker makes for an untrusted generator.
title_zh: 基于执行视频的检查程序恢复：面向不可信生成器的可靠预言机
abstract_zh: 有一类工具正日益增多，它们通过观察程序行为来恢复程序，但使用的是不可信的生成器（如神经模型或搜索方法），这些生成器提出的候选方案并不保证正确性。我们研究如何使此类恢复变得可信，具体场景是从程序的执行记录中恢复可运行的Scratch程序。该记录展示了程序的行为，但从未显示其代码；许多程序会产生相同的视频，因此无法恢复源码，而正确的目标是一个在摄像机所能观察的范围内行为一致的程序，这一概念通过透镜（lens）精确界定。核心是一个双层验证预言机（oracle），其裁决结果具有刻意的不对称性：静态检查器可证明程序与参照物在透镜意义下等价，并颁发证书——只要偏序独立性商（partial-order independence quotient）足够充分，该证书永远不会接受错误的程序；而渲染器只能反驳或见证有限的一致性，无法进行认证。围绕这一核心，Vid2Prog从视频和已知资产清单中读取每个精灵（sprite）的运动、可见性和时间信息，并综合生成无源码的候选程序；闭环系统再次渲染并运行恢复以获取真实情况。在精确透镜下，该预言机在246个标注为不同的配对中未产生任何误接受，其中包括一组旨在诱捕其并发性商（concurrency quotient）的对抗性测试集；对于词汇表之外的输入和真实项目，它要么放弃裁决，要么予以反驳，不接受我们测试的任何项目。词汇表内的恢复结果逐帧再现了其源码，其中80%获得了静态证书；而整个真实项目（大多在词汇表外）的恢复率为14%，系统从未通过错误答案来虚增这一受词汇表限制的比率。前沿的视觉语言模型（vision-language model）无法一次性恢复任何匹配的程序，通过预言机循环修复（oracle-in-the-loop repair）也只能将恢复数量提升到寥寥几个；而结构化流水线（structured pipeline）则恢复了全部，这一差距正是声音检查器（sound checker）对不可信生成器所带来的效果。

title: Cheap Code, Costly Judgment: A Case Study on Governable Agentic Software Engineering
authors: James C. Davis, Paschal C. Amusuo, Tanmay Singla, Berk Çakar, Kirsten A. Davis
publish: arXiv
abstract: Generative AI is shifting software engineering from a practice organized around scarce implementation effort toward one organized around abundant, low-cost code production. This shift changes the central engineering problem: not whether AI can generate useful code, but how engineers organize architectures, tools, evidence, and feedback loops so that AI-mediated development remains inspectable, correctable, and maintainable. We study this problem through a first-person case study: a 12-week development effort in which a single expert software engineer used frontier AI coding agents to build a document accessibility remediation system. The empirical record comprises 88 contemporaneous field notes, 420 KLOC of production code, and 1.16 MLOC of tests, lints, supporting documentation, and agent tooling. From this record, we develop a candidate middle-range theory of governance conversion, expressed as a process model explaining how high-velocity agentic implementation becomes governable. The model explains how agentic implementation velocity surfaces recurring structural failure classes, and how engineering judgment sustains velocity by converting those failures into durable governance mechanisms. In contrast to existing governance models that derive controls from known obligations, governance conversion explains how controls are discovered from failures that become visible only during agentic work. We use our model to make testable predictions and to describe implications for software engineering research and practice.
title_zh: 廉价代码，昂贵判断：关于可治理自主软件工程的案例研究
abstract_zh: 生成式人工智能正在将软件工程从围绕稀缺实施工作组织的方式，转变为围绕丰裕、低成本的代码生产组织的方式。这一转变改变了核心工程问题：关键不在于AI能否生成有用的代码，而在于工程师如何组织架构、工具、证据和反馈回路，使AI辅助的开发过程保持可审查、可修正和可维护性。我们通过一项第一人称案例研究来探讨这一问题：一位资深软件工程师在12周内利用前沿AI编码代理构建了一个文档无障碍修复系统。实证记录包括88篇及时编写的实地笔记、420千行生产代码，以及1.16兆行的测试、代码检查、配套文档和代理工具。基于这些记录，我们提出了一种候选的中层理论——治理转换，并将其表述为解释高速代理化实施如何变得可治理的过程模型。该模型揭示了代理化实施速度如何暴露结构性重复失败类型，以及工程判断如何通过将这些失败转化为持久的治理机制来维持速度。与现有从已知义务推导控制的治理模型不同，治理转换解释了控制如何从代理工作中才显现的失败中发现。我们利用该模型提出可验证的预测，并阐述其对软件工程研究与实践的启示。

title: Right in the Right Way: LM Training with Verifiable Rewards and Human Demonstrations
authors: Mehul Damani, Isha Puri, Idan Shenfeld, Jacob Andreas
publish: arXiv
abstract: RL with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has emerged as a powerful paradigm for training LMs on tasks with well-defined success metrics, such as code generation and mathematical reasoning. However, current RLVR methods optimize only what can be objectively scored, often neglecting subjective, non-verifiable aspects of human-like outputs, such as style and structure. This limitation leads to well-documented failure modes such as diversity collapse, unnatural-sounding responses, and reward hacking. We propose an adversarial generator-discriminator framework that augments verifiable rewards with a learned signal from human demonstrations. A generator model is trained using RL to maximize both task accuracy and an adversarial reward derived from a discriminator. The discriminator, trained alongside the generator policy, learns to distinguish human-written outputs from model-generated ones. The discriminator serves as a learned proxy for the human output distribution, providing feedback on aspects of generation that are difficult to formalize as scalar rewards. Across diverse domains, including bug fixing and open-ended generation, our approach consistently improves non-verifiable properties while preserving the accuracy gains of RLVR. In bug fixing, our method produces solutions with significantly lower edit distance compared to RLVR baselines while matching end performance. In story generation, our method significantly improves win rate while producing stories that are diverse and more human-like. And in a simple reward hacking benchmark, our method nearly eliminates model misbehavior while maintaining high benchmark scores. Together, these results show that our approach bridges RL and SFT, offering a scalable path toward jointly optimizing the verifiable and non-verifiable properties of a task.
title_zh: 以正确方式做正确之事：基于可验证奖励与人类示范的语言模型训练
abstract_zh: 具有可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）已成为在代码生成和数学推理等具有明确成功指标的任务上训练语言模型的有力范式。然而，当前的RLVR方法仅优化可客观评分的部分，往往忽略了人类风格和结构等主观且不可验证的输出特性。这一局限导致了诸如多样性崩溃、不自然响应和奖励欺骗等已被充分记录的失败模式。我们提出一种对抗性生成器-判别器框架，通过从人类演示中学习到的信号来增强可验证奖励。生成器采用强化学习进行训练，以同时最大化任务准确性和由判别器导出的对抗性奖励。判别器与生成器策略同步训练，学习区分人类撰写的输出与模型生成的输出。该判别器作为人类输出分布的学习代理，为难以形式化为标量奖励的生成方面提供反馈。在包括漏洞修复和开放式生成的多个领域内，我们的方法在保持RLVR准确率提升的同时，持续改善了不可验证的属性。在漏洞修复中，我们的方法生成的解决方案相较于RLVR基线显著降低了编辑距离，且端到端性能相当。在故事生成中，我们的方法显著提升了胜率，同时生成的故事更具多样性且更接近人类风格。在一个简单的奖励欺骗基准测试中，我们的方法几乎消除了模型的不良行为，同时保持了高基准分数。综合这些结果表明，我们的方法桥接了强化学习与监督微调，为共同优化任务的可验证与不可验证属性提供了一条可扩展的路径。

title: Practical Range Refinement Types with Inference
authors: Valentin Aebi, Carlo A. Furia
publish: arXiv
abstract: Refinement types are a static verification technique that aims at increasing the expressivity of traditional type systems while remaining easy and natural to use. While systems based on refinement types have been developed for several mainstream languages, their practical adoption remains limited by their annotation overhead, which is often a more significant burden than when using the "plain" type annotations of languages like Java or Scala. To improve the state of the art, this paper introduces Ranger: a refinement type system designed to keep the annotation overhead small and to seamlessly integrate with imperative-style constructs like variables and loops. As the name suggests, Ranger focuses on integer range types: a particular kind of refinement types that express bounded integer ranges. Such types are widely useful to verify correct index manipulation and in-bounds data accesses, among others. To combine expressiveness and succinctness, Ranger is based on a bidirectional type system, which runs a type inference algorithm to provide the typechecking pass with information useful to reduce the need for user-written auxiliary annotations. Ranger also integrates other forms of lightweight flow-sensitive static analysis techniques that precisely capture the program's behavior without explicit annotations. We implemented Ranger on top of the Licorne experimental programming language. Our experiments show that Ranger's implementation can concisely express and verify a variety of useful properties that fall beyond the capabilities of standard static type systems like those of Java and Scala, and that Ranger compares favorably to other extended type systems, such as the Java Checker Framework and Liquid Java, that can also check properties about ranges.
title_zh: 实用的带推断的范围精化类型
abstract_zh: 细化类型是一种静态验证技术，旨在增强传统类型系统的表达能力，同时保持易用性和自然性。虽然基于细化类型的系统已为多种主流编程语言所开发，但其实际应用仍受限于注释开销——这种负担往往比使用Java或Scala等语言的“普通”类型注释更为显著。为改进现有技术，本文介绍了Ranger：一种旨在保持低注释开销并与变量、循环等命令式结构无缝集成的细化类型系统。顾名思义，Ranger聚焦于整数范围类型：一种表达有界整数范围的特定细化类型。此类类型在验证正确的索引操作和边界内数据访问等方面具有广泛用途。为兼顾表现力与简洁性，Ranger基于双向类型系统运行类型推断算法，为类型检查过程提供有助于减少用户编写辅助注释所需的信息。此外，Ranger还集成了其他轻量级流敏感静态分析技术，无需显式注释即可精确捕捉程序行为。我们在实验性编程语言Licorne基础上实现了Ranger。实验表明，Ranger的实现能够简洁地表达和验证多种超出Java、Scala等标准静态类型系统能力的实用属性，并且与同样可检查范围属性的其他扩展类型系统（如Java检查器框架和Liquid Java）相比，Ranger具有更优表现。

title: Dependency-Aware Circuit Scheduling for Multi-Core Quantum Systems to Minimize Makespan
authors: Rajeswari Suance P S, Ruchika Gupta, Maurizio Palesi, John Jose
publish: arXiv
abstract: Multi-core quantum computing architectures have emerged as a promising solution to the qubit scalability limitations of monolithic NISQ devices. Quantum algorithms are expressed as quantum circuits composed of single- and two-qubit gates. However, circuit scheduling in multi-core quantum systems remains largely unexplored. Reducing overall execution time (makespan), increasing core utilization, and hiding communication latency behind computation depends on effective scheduling. In this paper, we first introduce a layered scheduling approach as a baseline where quantum gates within the same layer are executed in parallel, while layers themselves are executed sequentially. We then propose a greedy scheduling strategy which schedules each gate as soon as all its dependencies and required resources are available. This allows fine-grained parallelism across cores. Our evaluation shows that on real benchmarks, greedy scheduling achieves an average 40% reduction in makespan and improvement in core utilization. The results suggest that the use of intelligent circuit scheduling to exploit parallelism can greatly enhance the speed of circuit execution in multi-core quantum architectures.
title_zh: 面向多核量子系统的依赖感知电路调度以最小化完工时间
abstract_zh: 多核量子计算架构已成为解决单片NISQ设备量子比特可扩展性限制的一种有前景的方案。量子算法被表示为由单量子比特门和双量子比特门组成的量子电路。然而，多核量子系统中的电路调度问题在很大程度上仍未得到充分探索。减少整体执行时间（makespan）、提高核心利用率以及在计算过程中隐藏通信延迟，这些都依赖于有效的调度策略。本文首先引入了一种分层调度方法作为基线，其中同一层内的量子门并行执行，而层本身则顺序执行。随后，我们提出了一种贪心调度策略，该策略在每个门的所有依赖关系和所需资源均已就绪时立即对其进行调度。这种方法允许在核心之间实现细粒度并行。我们的评估结果表明，在实际基准测试中，贪心调度平均能将执行时间缩短40%，并提高核心利用率。这些结果说明，利用智能电路调度来挖掘并行性，可以极大地提升多核量子架构中电路执行的速度。
